title: そして、ブラックアウト

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, we were able to treat it early and it is
non-life-threatening, but I cannot recommend that she continue work
as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I see... Well, I knew that this day would come sooner or later. I'm
sorry, Bell.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-it's nothing you need to apologize for!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If anything, it should be me for not getting any stronger this whole
time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given the circumstances, it is decided that it is best that the chief
trainer moves on to retirement.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text: <username>, I'd like you to take over. I trust you.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text: If it's you, I know that things will be just fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her official retirement comes into effect two weeks from now. I've
accepted the job of chief trainer, but it is up to Mejiro Dober if she
wishes to stay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: For that reason, I make an effort to better understand her feelings.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but can this wait? I'd like to focus on my training right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but can we talk about this another time? I'd like to
concentrate on my training right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She placed all her faith in me, but I was never able to even give her
one win. I need to change that before it's too late.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She placed all her faith in me, but I was never able to even give her
one win. I need to change that before it's too late.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I only have two weeks, so I need to do everything I can right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the next few days, I'm busy with the handover and have little time
for much else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When those tasks finally come to an end, I can't help but think of
Mejiro Dober.
choice_data_list: I really should go check in on her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...
choice_data_list: Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Eh? You...
choice_data_list: Dober, isn't this a bit too much?
Dober, isn't this a bit too much?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Eh? Oh, Assistant Trainer...
choice_data_list: Dober, isn't this a bit too much?
Dober, isn't this a bit too much?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Shut up! Leave me alone!
choice_data_list: But if you push yourself like this...
But if you push yourself like this...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Please, would you leave me be? I told you that I don't have much
time!
choice_data_list: But if you push yourself like this...
But if you push yourself like this...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I HAVE to push myself. Because I'm so weak!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I HAVE to push myself. Because I'm so weak!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I've always, always been so weak!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I thought I would be able to start winning right away. To be able to
run with confidence like Bright... To be as strong as Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
As a member of the Mejiro family, there's so much I want to prove.
But I...

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And we have our first-place finisher! The other runners follow close
behind! Everyone, a big round of applause for everyone giving it their
best!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Oh, number 8 Mejiro Dober is rounding the last turn! She was a little
late out of the gate, but she hasn't given up!

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
You're doing your best! Just keep it up! Just a little farther! You can
do it!

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... gasp...

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
Doing your best? "Keep it up"? "It's okay"? I've never heard anyone
say those things to Ryan and the others...

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
They always yell about how fast and amazing Bright and Ryan are...
But not for me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That was a devastating day for me. I messed up at the start and
finished practically a whole lap behind everyone else. I've felt that
others have been laughing at me ever since.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I always feel ashamed and powerless... My heart starts to feel like it's
trying to escape my chest, and my legs begin to feel like they're not
even my own...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's why I can't run properly in front of people anymore! No one
else at the academy is like this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I felt myself getting slightly better with Trainer's guidance, but now
I'm going to lose her too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So I have to do something! I have to win a race, even if it means
pushing myself this hard!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm such a weakling, but I have to change that even if I have to do it
alone!
choice_data_list: You won't be alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: I'm here to support you.
I'm here to support you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You mean to say that things will be okay if you take over as my
trainer? That things will work out? Don't make me laugh!
choice_data_list:
It's because you are an extremely capable
runner!

It's because you are an extremely capable
runner!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Have you even been listening to anything I've been saying?! I'm a
weakling, and I always have been!
choice_data_list: You've also never given up.
You've also never given up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Keep going, keep goooing! Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I just know that I would face a repeat of that scrimmage race if I just
let things be, however.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I just know that I would face a repeat of that scrimmage race if I just
let things be, however.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking that talking to you could be some good mental
training for me! You can do that much as my assistant trainer, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So I was hoping... maybe I could talk with you to help me build some
mental fortitude. Would that be okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She placed all her faith in me, but I was never able to even give her
one win. I need to change that before it's too late.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She placed all her faith in me, but I was never able to even give her
one win. I need to change that before it's too late.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I only have two weeks, so I need to do everything I can right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't given up this entire time, chasing after her goal of winning
a race in front of the eyes of many.
choice_data_list:
Someone who doesn't give up cannot possibly
be a weakling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Gasp!
choice_data_list: Mejiro Dober, you are an incredible racer.
Mejiro Dober, you are an incredible racer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... I'm not...
choice_data_list: Dober! I'll be waiting for you!
Dober! I'll be waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I believe in her capabilities, even if she chooses to polish them alone.
I want her to understand, though, that if she needs any support, then
I'll be waiting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try my best to make that known to her as she dashes away into the
night.
